parameters.query:
INSERT INTO table_1 
  (conversation_id, tenant_id, role, content, tokens_used, credits_charged, platform)
VALUES
  ($1, $2, 'user',      $3, 0,  0,   $7),
  ($1, $2, 'assistant', $4, $5, $6,  $7)

parameters.jsCode:
const sub    = $input.first().json;
const norm   = $('Normalise Input').first().json;

return { json: {
  agent_reply:     sub.output        || '',
  response_type:   sub.response_type || 'text',
  message_type_in: sub.message_type_in || norm.message_type || 'text',
  conversation_id: sub.conversation_id || $('Upsert Conversation').first().json.conversation_id,
  tenant_id:       norm.tenant_id,
  chat_id:         norm.chat_id,
  bot_token:       norm.bot_token,       // for owner notifications
  wa_instance:     norm.wa_instance,     // for customer replies
  user_message:    norm.text || '',
  is_owner:        false,                // always false on WA

  has_new_order:              sub.has_new_order              || false,
  order_number:               sub.order_number               || null,
  order_summary:              sub.order_summary              || null,
  has_order_confirmed:        sub.has_order_confirmed        || false,
  confirmed_order_number:     sub.confirmed_order_number     || null,
  confirmed_customer_chat_id: sub.confirmed_customer_chat_id || null,
  payment_confirmed:          sub.payment_confirmed          || false,
  payment_order_number:       sub.payment_order_number       || null,
}};

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.telegram_id,
  t.preferred_name,
  t.full_name,
  b.business_name,
  b.business_type,
  b.business_mode,
  b.description AS business_description,
  c.agent_name,
  pi.access_token AS bot_token
FROM table_2 t
LEFT JOIN table_3 b ON b.id = $2::uuid
LEFT JOIN table_4 c ON c.business_id = b.id
JOIN table_5 pi
  ON pi.business_id = b.id AND pi.platform = 'telegram'
WHERE t.id = $1::uuid

SELECT 
  t.telegram_id,
  pi.access_token AS bot_token,
  b.id AS business_id
FROM table_2 t
JOIN table_3 b ON b.id = $2::uuid
JOIN table_5 pi 
  ON pi.business_id = b.id AND pi.platform = 'telegram'
WHERE t.id = $1::uuid

INSERT INTO table_6 (tenant_id, business_id, platform, chat_id, customer_id, last_msg_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $5, $3, $4, now())
ON CONFLICT (business_id, platform, chat_id)
DO UPDATE column_1 now()
RETURNING id AS conversation_id

parameters.name: text

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO table_16 (
    tenant_id, business_id, telegram_id, platform, platform_id,
    hourly_text_count, last_text_hour,
    daily_image_count, daily_voice_count,
    message_count, last_activity_date, last_seen_at,
    first_seen_at, display_name, username
)
VALUES (
    $1, $2, $3, $7, $8,
    CASE WHEN $6 = 'text' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN $6 = 'text' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END,
    CASE WHEN $6 = 'image' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN $6 = 'audio' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
    1, CURRENT_DATE, NOW(),
    NOW(),
    COALESCE($4, 'Customer'),
    COALESCE($5, '')
)
ON CONFLICT (business_id, platform, platform_id)
DO UPDATE column_2 CASE 
        WHEN $6 = 'text' THEN
            CASE 
                WHEN msq_customers.last_text_hour IS NULL 
                  OR msq_customers.last_text_hour < date_trunc('hour', NOW()) 
                THEN 1
                ELSE msq_customers.hourly_text_count + 1
            END
        ELSE msq_customers.hourly_text_count
    END,
    last_text_hour = CASE WHEN $6 = 'text' THEN NOW() ELSE msq_customers.last_text_hour END,
    daily_image_count = CASE 
        WHEN $6 = 'image' THEN
            CASE 
                WHEN msq_customers.last_activity_date IS NULL 
                  OR msq_customers.last_activity_date < CURRENT_DATE 
                THEN 1
                ELSE msq_customers.daily_image_count + 1
            END
        ELSE msq_customers.daily_image_count
    END,
    daily_voice_count = CASE 
        WHEN $6 = 'audio' THEN
            CASE 
                WHEN msq_customers.last_activity_date IS NULL 
                  OR msq_customers.last_activity_date < CURRENT_DATE 
                THEN 1
                ELSE msq_customers.daily_voice_count + 1
            END
        ELSE msq_customers.daily_voice_count
    END,
    message_count = msq_customers.message_count + 1,
    last_activity_date = CURRENT_DATE,
    last_seen_at = NOW(),
    display_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.display_name, msq_customers.display_name),
    username = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.username, msq_customers.username)
RETURNING
    (CASE 
        WHEN $6 = 'text' THEN
            (CASE 
                WHEN msq_customers.last_text_hour IS NULL 
                  OR msq_customers.last_text_hour < date_trunc('hour', NOW()) 
                THEN 1
                ELSE COALESCE(msq_customers.hourly_text_count, 0) + 1
            END) <= 30
        ELSE TRUE
    END) AS text_allowed,
    (CASE 
        WHEN $6 = 'image' THEN
            (CASE 
                WHEN msq_customers.last_activity_date IS NULL 
                  OR msq_customers.last_activity_date < CURRENT_DATE 
                THEN 1
                ELSE COALESCE(msq_customers.daily_image_count, 0) + 1
            END) <= 5
        ELSE TRUE
    END) AS image_allowed,
    (CASE 
        WHEN $6 = 'audio' THEN
            (CASE 
                WHEN msq_customers.last_activity_date IS NULL 
                  OR msq_customers.last_activity_date < CURRENT_DATE 
                THEN 1
                ELSE COALESCE(msq_customers.daily_voice_count, 0) + 1
            END) <= 10
        ELSE TRUE
    END) AS voice_allowed,
    (CASE 
        WHEN $6 = 'file' THEN
            (CASE 
                WHEN msq_customers.last_activity_date IS NULL 
                  OR msq_customers.last_activity_date < CURRENT_DATE 
                THEN 1
                ELSE COALESCE(msq_customers.daily_image_count, 0) + 1
            END) <= 3
        ELSE TRUE
    END) AS file_allowed

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $('Inject Tenant ID').first().json.tenant_id,
  $('Inject Tenant ID').first().json.business_id,
  null,
  $('Parse WhatsApp Update').first().json.first_name || null,
  $('Parse WhatsApp Update').first().json.username || null,
  $('Parse WhatsApp Update').first().json.message_type,
  'whatsapp',
  $('Parse WhatsApp Update').first().json.sender_id
] }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO table_17 (platform_user_id, last_image_url, updated_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, now())
ON CONFLICT (platform_user_id)
DO UPDATE column_3 $2,
  updated_at     = now()

SELECT tenant_id, business_id, phone_number_id
FROM table_5
column_4 $1
  column_5 'whatsapp'
  column_6 true
LIMIT 1

SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM table_16
  column_7 $1
    column_5 'whatsapp'
    column_8 $2
) AS is_first_contact

INSERT INTO table_16 (
  tenant_id, business_id, platform, platform_id, display_name, message_count
)
VALUES ($1, $2, 'whatsapp', $3, $4, 1)
ON CONFLICT (business_id, platform, platform_id) DO UPDATE column_9 msq_customers.message_count + 1,
  display_name  = EXCLUDED.display_name

-- Migration for Catalogue Manager feature
-- Run this before importing the workflows

-- Session table for catalogue manager links
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS msq_catalogue_sessions (
    token        text        PRIMARY KEY,
    tenant_id    uuid        NOT NULL REFERENCES msq_tenants(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    business_id  uuid        NOT NULL,
    expires_at   timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT (now() + interval '7 days'),
    created_at   timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_msq_cat_sessions_tenant ON msq_catalogue_sessions(tenant_id);

-- Ensure msq_product_images has all columns needed
ALTER TABLE msq_product_images
    ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS display_name   text,
    ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS price          numeric,
    ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS price_label    text,
    ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS show_on_store  boolean DEFAULT true,
    ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS image_type     text    DEFAULT 'product',
    ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sort_order     int     DEFAULT 0;

UPDATE table_5
column_6 true, connected_at = now()
column_4 $1 column_5 'whatsapp'
RETURNING tenant_id, business_id, phone_number_id

SELECT t.telegram_id, bp.business_name
FROM table_3 bp
JOIN table_2 t ON t.id = bp.tenant_id
WHERE bp.id = $1::uuid
LIMIT 1

SELECT t.telegram_id
FROM table_5 pi_wa
JOIN table_3 bp ON bp.id = pi_wa.business_id
JOIN table_2 t ON t.id = bp.tenant_id
WHERE pi_wa.access_token = $1 AND pi_wa.platform = 'whatsapp'
LIMIT 1

parameters.text:
=🔐 *Pairing Code: {{ $('Has Pairing Code?').first().json.pairingCode }}*

In WhatsApp: 
→ *Settings → Linked Devices → Link a Device* 
→ Tap *'Link with Phone Number instead'*  

Enter the code within 60 seconds. I'll confirm once connected. ✅

Your business *{{ $json.business_name }}* is now live on WhatsApp.

Customers can now reach you. 🎉
